name: Anika Tabassum
comment: KarigoriKraft-er yarn gulo asholei osadharon. Ami amar prothom project-er jonno silk thread niyechi, quality ekdom top-notch!

name: Tanvir Ahmed
comment: Delivery ektu deri hoyeche kintu packaging chilo khub e sundor. Beads gulo dekhte premium lage.

name: Nusrat Jahan
comment: Handmade jinish-er jonno KarigoriKraft-er upor bhorsha kora jay. Tader collection asholei unique.
